CONTACTID.TEXT: Hey Frank, long time no see. What happend here?
Hey {0}, Seems like a Hit and Run.
Is anyone injured?
I'm afraid so. The driver of the truck rolled his vehicle and got injured. Paramedics are taking care about him in the ambulance. He will be sent to the hospital.
It's been a while since I saw an accident like this. Do we know the cause?
The worker here told me that a vehicle went into the truck's lane and made him swerve to avoid the oncoming car, however you could talk to him.
Sure, I'll see what he tells me.
That is all I can tell you!
Hello Sir, my partner told me you know what happened.
Yes, Officer. A stupid asshole overtook me and the truck swerved and ended up in the woods. I immediately called 911.
Thank you for that. Do you remember anything about the vehicle or driver?
Yes actually, I own the same vehicle. It was a ~y~
Okay. Did you see the license plate?
I think it was ~y~
Thanks for your help. Give this officer a detailed statement and you will be free to leave.
Okay Officer. Thanks.
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
Hi Partner. Wow. That's a deep fall! Let me guess: Drunk Driver.
Hey {0}, Nope. Actually it is a Hit and Run.
Really. On this road? What happened?
The driver of the Log truck rolled his vehicle and got injured by evading a speeding car. He will be sent to the hospital.
Do we know anything about this car?
His co-driver told me that this vehicle nearly lost control, however you could talk to him.
Yep. I will take over here okay?
Sure thanks. It's yours.
Hey. Can you repeat for me that what you told my partner?
Yes, Officer. A stupid asshole came down the hill with an insane speed. My buddy had to go off the road not to hit him.
Can you remember that car?
Yeah, I do. It was a ~y~
Okay. Did you see the license plate?
Yes i also remember this. It was ~y~
Thanks for your help. Please stay here until the recovery crane has arrived.
Okay Officer. Thanks.
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
Hi, what the hell happened here?
Hey Officer {0}, thanks for the fast response. According to the first infos I have, it seems to be a Hit and Run
Did you already talk to victims and witnesses?
No sorry, i was helping securing the scene and keep the traffic flow.
Okay, then i will talk to the involved people to gain information about a possible suspect.
Thanks, meanwhile i will take care about the traffic, see ya later.
Hi, my name is {0} from the {1}. Can you tell me what happened?
Oh my god, i hope she will be ok, they just have taken her to the hospital.
Calm down, everything will be fine. I need you to tell me what happened. Can you do that for me?
I think so, but it all happened so fast... it wasn't my fault.. i needed to pull away...
From what did you pull away. Did a car cut you? Please be more precise.
Yes, it switched to my lane without noticing me. I think it was a
Are you sure about this?
No I'm not.. please ask the others.. maybe the can tell you more.
Okay, thanks again. Just keep calm, she will be ok
Hello, {0}. Are you okay? Can i ask you some questions?
Hi, yeah sure, go ahead
The guy that flipped the car told me that he was cut by a car which switched the lane, is this correct?
Yes. I had to brake hard to stop my car. But i touched the barriers anyway. Now look at my car
Sorry for that. Can you remember a licence plate or a the car type or maybe the color?
Not really, I was focusing not to crash.
Thanks for your time, if you need anything then contact {0}.
Hey there, I'm officer {0}. It seems that your car is fine. Why are you here?
Hi, i was the one that called 9-1-1. And i decided to stay cause i have wrote down the car that caused this mess.
Perfect. So you can tell me the licence plate of the
Yes i can tell you, but it wasn't a
Ok, then what car was it?
It was a
Thanks for helping out, it will help to identify this reckless driver. You can leave now
Okay. Bye
Hey Partner. This crash looks serious. Do you know what happened?
Hi {0}, Yeah, it's a miracle that there is not more damage. Looks like a Hit and Run, but I'm not sure
How do you know. Have you already talked to involved people?
Unfortunately not. I took care about getting EMS and the fire team here.
Okay, then I will start questioning to see if we get a cause or maybe a suspect.
Meanwhile I will contact dispatch and give them an update about the status here.
Hello, I'm officer {0} from the {1}. Are you able to answer some questions?
Oh hi, ehm... yes maybe... they just took my wife to the hospital with the helicopter. They said that she has internal chest injuries.
Damn, sad to hear that. But she is in god hands. Can you tell me what happened?
I was driving on the second lane at suddenly the guy on the first one pulled over.I reacted and flipped the car.
Do you remember a car type or license plate of this vehicle?
I'm really not sure. Maybe it was a
Did the person set the indicator, or did he just pull to your side?
No. He just pulled to my lane without any notice
Thanks for your info. Maybe {0} will contact you again.
Hi, {0}. Are you the second involved person of this crash?
Hi yes, I was driving behind the car that flipped.
So can you describe the situation that caused this accident?
Sure. A vehicle pulled into the guys car with any notice.. One thing led to another and BAAM.
Do you remember a licence plate or a the car type or maybe the color?
No sorry.
Thanks for your time, if you need anything then contact {0}.
Hello, my name is officer {0}. Can you tell me what you doing here?
Hello officer. I saw exactly what happened from the other side.
Okay. The victims sad that a vehicle pulled on the other lane and caused the crash. It was a
Then they must be wrong. It was definitely not a
Interesting. So then please update me.
Yes sure. I memorized it. It was a
Thanks for your help. You can leave now
Bye
Wow. It has been a while since a crash happened here. What's going on?
Hey {0}. You're right. No issue here a long time.
Did you already make contact with the involved people?
Nope. You're the higher ranked cop here. Please take care of it.
Always the same excuse. This is getting old. Well okay, I will do it.
Thank you very much. I will keep traffic off your back
Hey, my name is {0} from the {1}. Are you okay?
Yes I'm fine, just some bruising. But my daughter is injured. EMS is now talking her to the hospital
Sorry to hear that. Is it possible for you to answer some questions regarding the crash?
Well I hope I remember something. It's all a bit blurred from the impact. I will try.
How did this happen? Was any other vehicle involved in this accident?
Yes, another car switched to my lane and I had to brake hard. But it wasn't enough. I think it was a
Please take a time and think about your answer.
Well sorry. I can't tell if my answer is correct.. please question the others.. maybe they know.
Okay, thanks anyway.
Hello, {0}. Can I talk to you for a second?
Hi, sure, go ahead
The guy that flipped his car told me that the crash was caused by a third car, is this correct?
Yep. As you can see, I tried to stop but failed.
Can you remember a licence plate or a the car type or maybe the color?
No sorry. My eyes where focused on car in front of me... sorry
Okay, if you need anything then contact {0}.
Hey there, I'm officer {0}. Are you the 911 caller?
Yes I called the police. I was driving a little bit behind those two when the accident happened
There seems to be a third car which was causing the accident. Did you see the licence plate of the
Yes, but the car wasn't a
Then the others must be wrong. Which type was it?
It was a
Thanks for your help, appreciate it. You can leave now
Okay. Goodbye
